# ML CVEs

> A focused tracker for CVEs in ML and AI infrastructure. PyTorch, TensorFlow, ONNX, vLLM, llama.cpp, transformers, langchain, LlamaIndex, model registries, and the broader AI/ML supply chain — dated, sourced to NVD or vendor advisory.

## Docs

- [About](https://mlcves.com/about): Editorial scope, coverage standards, and contributor guidelines.
- [Archive](https://mlcves.com/posts): Full archive of all CVE entries and analyses.
- [RSS Feed](https://mlcves.com/rss.xml): Subscribe to new entries via RSS.
- [Sitemap](https://mlcves.com/sitemap-index.xml): Full site sitemap for crawlers.

## Topics

- [ML CVEs](https://mlcves.com/posts): CVEs in PyTorch, TensorFlow, ONNX, vLLM, llama.cpp, transformers.
- [Supply Chain Vulnerabilities](https://mlcves.com/posts): AI/ML dependency and registry vulnerabilities.
- [Model Security](https://mlcves.com/posts): Model leaks, training data exposures, and adversarial disclosures.
- [Regulatory Actions](https://mlcves.com/posts): Regulatory enforcement actions against AI companies.
